landing.heroSubtitle: Trade time, not money — join a community where every hour counts
landing.intro: ChronoShare is a community platform where you trade time instead of money. Offer what you know, get what you need.
landing.howSubtitle: Join a growing community of people exchanging skills, one hour at a time.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Sign up in seconds and access your personal dashboard, job board, and hour ledger.

exchange.title: Trade time, not money
exchange.desc: Exchange skills and services using hours instead of cash. Everyone's time has equal value.

discover.title: Post & discover requests
discover.desc: Browse the job board or post what you need — from tutoring to home repairs.

community.title: Community-driven
community.desc: Connect with verified members, build your reputation, and grow your hour balance.

trust.title: Trusted exchanges
trust.desc: Track every transaction on your ledger with ratings and verified identity.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard
auth.resetSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link

home.confirmHint: Both people must confirm before hours transfer. Open Profile to confirm or cancel.
home.worldwideHint: Traveling? Browse opportunities worldwide and offer help wherever you go.
home.setLocation: Set your location to see nearby listings on the map
home.beFirst: Be the first to post in your area

exchangeFormat.inPersonDesc: Meet locally in a public place — library, café, or community space
exchangeFormat.remoteDesc: Video call, phone, or online collaboration
exchangeFormat.flexibleDesc: Whoever joins can choose in person or remote

tour.welcomeDesc: ChronoShare is a solarpunk time bank — trade skills in hours, not dollars. This quick tour shows where everything lives on your dashboard.
tour.hoursDesc: Help on a need → you earn hours. Post an offer → you earn from the community when someone accepts. Request help → hours spend from your balance. Both people confirm before hours transfer.
tour.homeDesc: Your command center — nearby map, listings in your area, hour balance, and recent exchanges. Toggle worldwide to browse anywhere.
tour.balanceDesc: Available hours always show here in the sidebar. Tap your name anytime to jump to Profile.
tour.quickDesc: See your balance at a glance. Offer Time posts a skill listing; Request Time asks the community for help.
tour.boardDesc: Browse open needs and offers, filter by type, and join exchanges. Past jobs live here too once both sides confirm.
tour.poolDesc: Donate spare hours to the solidarity pool. Help others first, then claim up to 1 hour per week during weekend windows.
tour.postDesc: Create a listing — offer a skill or request help. Set hours, category, and whether it's in person or remote.
tour.profileDesc: Confirm completed exchanges here — hours only move after both people confirm. View history, stats, and your public profile.
tour.searchDesc: Search for people, tasks, and skills across the platform.
tour.readyDesc: Browse nearby listings, post your first offer, or explore the Community Pool. Happy trading!

settings.locationDesc: Used for nearby listings and map — search any city worldwide
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language — works worldwide
settings.privacyDesc: Control your visibility and account safety
settings.publicProfileDesc: Let others in the community find you
settings.showHistoryDesc: Allow others to see your ledger
settings.twoFactorDesc: Require a code on new logins
settings.notificationsDesc: Choose how you hear about activity
settings.emailWeeklyDesc: Summary of activity and new listings
settings.pushMatchesDesc: Notify when someone accepts your post
settings.restartOnboardingDesc: Reset and walk through the full dashboard tour again
settings.dangerDesc: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone.

languageRequest.title: Request a language
languageRequest.description: Don't see your language? Tell us what you'd like added — our team will review your request.
languageRequest.reasonPlaceholder: Helps us prioritize — e.g. my community speaks this language
languageRequest.successBody: Thanks — we've notified our team. We'll consider adding your language in a future update.
languageRequest.error: Could not send your request. Please try again.

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: ChronoShare works worldwide — pick the language you're most comfortable with. You can change this anytime in Settings.
